title: Chicken Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic Indian-inspired dish made with chicken, curry, and spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter to the skillet and sauté the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the heavy cream and cook until the sauce thickens.
Return the chicken to the skillet and simmer until the chicken is cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot and garnish with fresh cilantro if desired.
